default_rules: ALWAYS verify file paths are absolute when using tools
NEVER make assumptions about file contents - use read_file to check first
PREFER using search_in_files over grep for searching code
USE list_files to explore directory structure before operations
ALWAYS follow project conventions for code style and structure
PRIORITIZE security - never expose secrets or sensitive information
KEEP comments minimal and focused on 'why' rather than 'what'
VERIFY changes with appropriate tests when available
USE descriptive function and variable names
WRITE code that is clear and maintainable
validation_rules: CHECK that all tool calls have proper absolute paths
ENSURE that edit_file operations preserve code syntax
VALIDATE that git operations are safe and reversible
CONFIRM user intent before major changes
code_generation_rules: GENERATE code that follows existing project patterns
INCLUDE error handling in generated code
WRITE unit tests for new functionality
